items.title: API server not public
items.desc: Restrict kube-apiserver to private networks or authorized IPs.

items.title: RBAC least privilege
items.desc: No cluster-admin for apps; namespace-scoped roles only.

items.title: Pod Security Standards enforced
items.desc: Restricted or baseline policy on all namespaces.

items.title: Secrets not in env vars
items.desc: Use CSI drivers or mounted volumes; encrypt etcd at rest.

items.title: Network policies default deny
items.desc: Explicit allow rules between pods and egress.

items.title: Images scanned for CVEs
items.desc: Trivy or similar in CI; block critical vulns on deploy.

items.title: No privileged containers
items.desc: Drop capabilities; read-only root filesystem where possible.

items.title: Image signing and admission control
items.desc: Only signed images from trusted registries.

items.title: Resource limits set
items.desc: CPU and memory limits prevent DoS via resource exhaustion.
